| Week   | Dates          | Driving Question                                     | Tuesday                                                  | Thursday                                                                 | Data Story                                                |
| ------ | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| **1**  | Sept 9, 11     | **What is data science?**                            | Course intro, Colab, first notebook, exploring a dataset | Variables, expressions, DataFrames, first summaries                      | **How astronomers discovered the first exoplanets**  |
| **2**  | Sept 16, 18    | **What can a graph tell us?**                        | First visualizations (histograms, bar charts)            | Scatter plots & choosing the right graph                                 | **Anscombe's Quartet**                                    |
| **3**  | Sept 23, 25    | **Can graphs fool us?**                              | Reading CSV files, filtering, sorting                    | Cleaning data & the **First Data Investigation**                         | **Datasaurus Dozen**                                      |
| **4**  | Sept 30, Oct 2 | **What does "typical" really mean?**                 | Means, medians, variability                              | Exploring distributions                                                  | **Google Flu Trends**                                     |
| **5**  | Oct 7, 9       | **Where did these data come from?**                  | Missing data & tidy data                                 | Case study: messy real dataset + discussion of bias & representativeness | **Challenger Disaster**                                   |
| **6**  | Oct 14, 16     | **How do groups differ?**                            | Groupby & aggregation                                    | Comparing groups + **Data Investigation 2**                              | **Election Polls** *(before November elections)*          |
| **7**  | Oct 21, 23     | **Can data tell a story?**                           | Multi-variable visualizations, dashboards                | **TEST 1**                                                               | **LIGO's first gravitational-wave detection**                                             |
| **8**  | Oct 28, 30     | **How do we combine different sources of data?**     | Joins & merging tables                                   | Multi-table investigation                                                | **John Snow's Cholera Map**                               |
| **9**  | Nov 4, 6       | **Can we automate repetitive work?**                 | Functions & reusable code                                | Project proposal + introduction to simulation                            | **The Event Horizon Telescope**                                     |
| **10** | Nov 11, 13     | **Can a small sample represent a large population?** | Random sampling                                          | Bootstrap & confidence intervals + **Data Investigation 3**              | **How political polling works**                           |
| **11** | Nov 18, 20     | **When does a relationship matter?**                 | Correlation & simple regression                          | **TEST 2**                                                               | **Netflix recommendations**                               |
| —      | Nov 25, 27     | Thanksgiving                                         | —                                                        | —                                                                        | —                                                         |
| **12** | Dec 2, 4       | **Should we trust every algorithm?**                 | Ethics, fairness, AI, bias                               | Ethics workshop + project draft                                          | **COMPAS & AI bias**                                      |
| **13** | Dec 9, 11      | **What story does your data tell?**                  | Project work day                                         | Student presentations                                                    | Student-selected "Data Story"                             |
